rulings.Case Title: DAVID GOLDFARB et al VS. TRINITY PROPERTIES et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 10, 2014, line 4. DEFENDANTs TRINITY PROPERTIES, TRINITY SAN FRANCISCO, L.P. and TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED. rulings.Case Title: SEAN MARTIN VS. SHANON LOFTUS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 10, 2014, line 5. PLAINTIFF SEAN MARTIN's MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT GRANTED. No opposition filed. Defendant shall have 10 days from the notice of entry of order to file an amended answer in conformity with CCP 431.30(d). = (501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: MELINDA HOM TRUSTEE OF THE JAMES LEE 2010 VS. FEI LA JIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motin To Compel Melinda Hom'S Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Requests For Admissions, And For An Award Of Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 10, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANT FEI JIA's Motion to Compel Melinda Hom's Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Requests For Admissions, And For An Award Of Sanctions Hearing Required. Parties are ordered to appear at 9:00 a.m. and engage in meaningful meet and confer efforts. Parties are to report of their progress at 9:30 a.m. = (501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: MELINDA HOM TRUSTEE OF THE JAMES LEE 2010 VS. FEI LA JIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Restricting Discovery And Imposing Monetary Sanction
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 10, 2014, line 6. PLAINTIFF MELINDA HOM's Motion For Protective Order Restricting Discovery And Imposing Monetary Sanction Granted in part and Denied in part. Motion is GRANTED as to the requests directed at Defendant's not yet asserted affirmative defenses. Plaintiff does not need to provide further responses at this time. Motion is otherwise denied. No sanctions. = (501/LKS)
